content:
感謝各位守密人的支持！
《忘卻前夜》OST：領航手記，今日發佈～歡迎大家收聽、下載及分享～如果有基於OST的二次創作，也歡迎分享給我們！ （二創請遵照同人規則，OST內容請勿商用）

忘卻前夜OST：領航手記
嘿喲，嘿喲，拉起船錨，升起船帆，解開最後一條纜繩。
我們的領航員爬上桅杆，鮮豔的旗幟已高高掛起。
啟航，啟航，向她指引的方向，我們就要啟航！

作曲：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
規劃：B.I.A.V. Studio

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

Thank you for your support!

《Morimens》OST：《Navigator's Log》 was released today. 
Welcome everyone to listen, download and share. If you have secondary creations based on the OST, please also share them with us!
 (Please follow the rules of the fandom for secondary creations, and do not use the OST content for commercial purposes)

《Morimens》OST：《Navigator's Log》 
Hey, hey, pull up the anchor, hoist the sail, and untie the last rope.
Our navigator has climbed up the mast, and the bright flag has been hoisted high.
Set sail, set sail, in the direction she points to, we are about to set sail!

Composer：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio

Planning：B.I.A.V. Studio

**01.長夜炬火-Beacon in the Endless Night-**

如若這世界已陷入黑暗，那我將做最後的炬火。
如若人群中已再無正義，那我將為最弱者發聲。
If the world has fallen into darkness, I will be the last torch.
If there is no justice among the crowd, I will speak for the weakest.

**02.聖艾爾摩之火-St. Elmo's Fire-**

傳說中領航員死後，會在桅杆之上化作一團藍白色的閃光，繼續指引船隻的航行。
那麼她在桅杆的最頂端點燃了自己的生命時，是否看見了那一道希望的歸路？
According to legend, after the navigator dies, he will turn into a blue-white flash on the mast and continue to guide the ship's voyage.
So when she lit her life at the top of the mast, did she see the hopeful way home?

**03.領航員輓歌-Elegy of the Coxwain-**

她在每一次出航時，都準備好了最新的遺書。
那首代代相傳的歌謠如夢中的搖籃曲，將她的靈魂輕柔擁抱。
鮮豔的旗幟在風中飄蕩，她的肉體或會崩解、腐爛、沉入深海，她的靈魂必將佇立在她的船上，向著星辰與大海發出永恆的光芒。
She prepared the latest suicide note every time she sailed.
The ballad passed down from generation to generation is like a lullaby in a dream, gently embracing her soul.
The bright flag fluttered in the wind, her body might collapse, rot, and sink into the deep sea, but her soul would stand on her ship, emitting eternal light to the stars and the sea.

<:cute1:1356053053568192717> 以上就是本次OST的全部曲目囉~
The above are all the tracks of this OST~
Your music in this game is truly amazing 👏
